tasks.instruction: Take a couples compatibility quiz that has between 10 and 20 questions and save your completed results under the label 'Alex & Sam compatibility - March'.

qq_couples15_q2.selected_option_text: We stay calm, listen, and usually resolve it well

qq_couples15_q5.selected_option_text: Naturally balance it in a way that works for both

qq_couples15_q6.selected_option_text: Different but we manage them with conversation

qq_couples15_q7.selected_option_text: Mostly aligned with a few small differences

qq_couples15_q8.selected_option_text: Are close, but one of us sometimes wants more/less

qq_couples15_q9.selected_option_text: Tries to help, even if it isnt perfect

qq_couples15_q10.selected_option_text: Talk about them, but sometimes one person leads

qq_couples15_q11.selected_option_text: Unbalanced, with one person carrying more of the load

qq_couples15_q13.selected_option_text: Trustworthy in some areas but not others

qq_couples15_q14.selected_option_text: Often a source of conflict or jealousy

qq_couples15_q15.selected_option_text: Unsure if were truly compatible long term
